channel.title: product center - radar on Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.
channel.description: Recent content in product center - radar on Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.

item.title: SRC-X01C-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-X01C-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: SRC-K01B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K01B-2D moving target surveillance radar adopts azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beam forming technology. It provides all-day, all-weather continuous detection and tracking of moving targets within the area, featuring high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high precision.

item.title: SRC-K02E-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K02E-2G moving target surveillance radar is specifically designed for the detection and real-time tracking of moving targets on the ground and water surfaces. It serves as an all-weather, day-and-night efficient surveillance system, capable of stable operation even in complex environments and harsh weather conditions. Employing a Digital Beamforming (DBF) system, the radar can accurately detect and track various types of targets, providing detailed information such as distance, speed, azimuth, and type. It features functions including boundary crossing alerts, early warnings, and recording capabilities.

item.title: SRC-K03B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K03B-2D moving target surveillance radar employs an azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming architecture. It enables continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and superior accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X05E-3D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05E-3D moving target surveillance radar employs a two-dimensional electronic scanning system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-C03A-1G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-C03A-1G is a practical C band surveillance radar for civil security projects that need dependable surface-target awareness without the complexity of a large multi-radar architecture. Based on the source material, the system combines one radar array with one power adapter and uses MIMO plus DBF processing to reduce clutter and improve track stability.

item.title: SRC-K04A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K04A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs a Digital Beamforming (DBF) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X05B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05B-2D moving target surveillance radar adopts azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming technology. It provides all-day, all-weather continuous detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high precision.

item.title: SRC-X05A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X08B-2D moving target surveillance radar utilizes an azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming system. It enables continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high accuracy.

item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X10A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. item.title: SRC-X16A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X16A-2G target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.
